prompt: Build a CSS typography system for a web app and demonstrate it with HTML showing h1 through h3 headings, body paragraphs, and a caption/label style. Use realistic sample copy. Output a single self-contained HTML file with embedded CSS.
assertions: Body text has line-height of 1.5 or greater
Defines at least 4 distinct font-size values across the type scale
Body text container has a max-width to constrain line length (not full viewport width)
Uses at least 3 distinct font-weight values across heading levels and body
